title: InvalidSession holds &'static str; new session fields require string literals
description: ClientError::InvalidSession(&'static str) forces all callers to use string literals. A contributor who adds a new required session field and validates it with a runtime-computed message (e.g. including the field value) cannot use InvalidSession — they must either use a different error variant or add a new variant. The constraint is invisible in the type signature: it looks like any string parameter. This will silently break when someone tries InvalidSession(format\!(...)) and gets a lifetime error.
